title: Gowramma
desc: Venky, a boy from a small town, comes to the city in pursuit of education. His father wants him to do a productive job and sends him to the city to get a job at a friend's place.

title: Ee Bandhana
desc: An old couple sacrifices everything, so their children live a happy life. However, they are forced to separate and subjected to ill-treatment and disrespect in their children's homes.

title: Kotigobba 3
desc: After succeeding at framing ACP Kishore, Satya goes on to become an international criminal. While he gets targeted by Interpol, Kishore seeks revenge on him too, upon being released from prison.

title: Majili
desc: Poorna, an aspiring cricketer, falls into a deep depression after being abandoned by his lover, Anshu. Despite this, he is forced to marry his neighbour Sravani, who secretly has feelings for him.

title: Neenello Naanalle
desc: Santosh meets a charming village girl and ends up falling for her when he returns to India with his mother for a wedding.
